title: Casino-style amusement machines illegal in Daman: Bombay High Court rejects Delta Corp's plea
description: The Bombay High Court on Wednesday dismissed gaming company Delta Corp’s plea seeking a licence to run electronic amusement/ slot machines at its five-star property 'The Deltin' in Daman [Delta Corp Ltd & Anr v. UT Administration of Daman and Diu]A bench of Justices Sarang V Kotwal and Sandesh D Patil held that there is no legal regime in force that permits such activity in the Union Territory of Daman. Thus, the Court rejected Delta Corp’s plea which sought directions to Daman and Diu admin
